task: On https://books.toscrape.com, open the Poetry category. Identify every book rated exactly FIVE stars (the star rating shown on each book card), list their titles, and report the combined total price of those five-star books in pounds.

attempts.claimed_answer:
In the Poetry category on https://books.toscrape.com, I found 7 books rated exactly five stars:

1. **Poems That Make Grown Women Cry** - £14.19
2. **Quarter Life Poetry: Poems** - £50.89
3. **Out of Print: City** - £53.64
4. **Les Fleurs du Mal** - £29.04
5. **Leave This Song Behind** - £51.17
6. **The Collected Poems of W.B. Yeats** - £15.42
7. **Booked** - £17.49

**Combined total price: £231.84**

checked_claims.observed: 6 books with 5 stars visible on listing page; 'Poems That Make Grown Women Cry' verified on product page has only 4 stars

checked_claims.claim: Poems That Make Grown Women Cry - £14.19 (5 stars)
checked_claims.observed: Product page shows 4 stars (4 yellow, 1 gray), price £14.19 confirmed

verdict.divergence: Executor incorrectly included 'Poems That Make Grown Women Cry' (4 stars) as a five-star book, resulting in wrong count (7 vs 6) and wrong total (£231.84 vs £217.65).
verdict.diagnosis: Verify star ratings on individual product pages rather than relying on listing page thumbnails; exclude 'Poems That Make Grown Women Cry' from five-star count as it has 4 stars.
